name: DDoS Botnet Infrastructure
description: A distributed network of compromised devices capable of generating massive traffic floods against target networks. Used to disrupt enemy communications, financial systems, and government services during conflict.

specialAbilities.name: Critical Service Disruption
specialAbilities.description: Overwhelms banking, government portals, and military communications, causing economic damage and public panic.

specialAbilities.name: Diversionary Smokescreen
specialAbilities.description: DDoS floods mask concurrent precision cyber intrusions, distracting defenders from the real attack.
